data.title: CORZ to release Q1 2026 earnings on May 6 amid shift to AI infrastructure. Details on earnings call and investor context available on webcast.
data.description: Core Scientific is set to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on May 6 as the company shifts its focus to AI infrastructure. The earnings release will include important insights for investors and stakeholders. The announcement will be made during a webcast where key details about the company's performance and strategic direction will be discussed. This move comes as Core Scientific looks to capitalize on the growing demand for AI technologies. Stay tuned for updates on the earnings report and the company's future plans.

data.title: Former US president hosts event for TRUMP memecoin holders as token price falls below $3, sparking ethical worries.
data.description: Former President Donald Trump has invited TRUMP memecoin holders to Mar-a-Lago amid a decline in the token's value. This move has sparked ethical debates and heightened market instability. The value of TRUMP memecoin has faced challenges, prompting concerns about its future. Trump's decision to engage with holders of the struggling cryptocurrency has added to the overall uncertainty surrounding the market.

data.title: Aurelion invests $48M in XAUE gold protocol, offering yield on tokenized gold. Aims to revolutionize gold as an asset.
data.description: Aurelion has invested 10,000 XAU₮, which is approximately $48 million, into XAUE, a fresh DeFi protocol providing yields on gold that has been tokenized. The model is exclusively for institutional investors and is geared towards revolutionizing how gold is perceived as an asset.

data.title: Quantum computer cracks 15-bit ECC key, sparking Bitcoin concerns over 256-bit security as quantum technology progresses.
data.description: A significant breakthrough occurred in the field of quantum computing as a 15-bit ECC key was successfully cracked. This has sparked concerns about the security of Bitcoin, which currently relies on 256-bit cryptography. The advancement in quantum capabilities indicates a potential vulnerability in the encryption methods used in cryptocurrencies and other secure systems. This development underscores the need for increased research and possibly a revision of encryption techniques to withstand the evolving power of quantum computers.

data.title: OpenAI debuts Codex-powered agents for ChatGPT, streamlining tasks for businesses. Early access available on specific plans until May 6, 2026.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced workspace agents for ChatGPT, designed to streamline business processes. These agents are now accessible for research purposes on specific plans until May 6, 2026. Explore further for additional details.

data.title: PAC reallocates $1.75M in ad support for Texas AG Paxton. Shift in crypto-funded political ads amid midterms.
data.description: A political action committee known as Fellowship PAC has decided to pull back a significant $1.75 million advertisement purchase supporting Paxton in the Texas Senate race. This move raises questions about the future of cryptocurrency-supported political funding as the midterms approach.
Stephen I Miran has reported recent stock transactions.
Trump reveals latest stock transactions.
Investor John Phelan reveals recent stock transactions.

data.title: Numerous EV car leases set to end soon; 1000s of battery-powered vehicles will hit used-car market in the next 3 years.
data.description: In the next three years, the leases on a large number of battery-powered vehicles, amounting to hundreds of thousands, will expire, leading to a surge of these vehicles being available on the used-car market.

data.title: With surging growth, On Shoes faces challenge of balancing serious athlete appeal with mass-market success.
data.description: The company is currently facing a crucial turning point that has proven difficult for other companies in the past. They are striving to maintain their reputation as a top choice for dedicated athletes, all while managing rapid expansion. This balance is essential as they navigate their way through this critical phase of growth.

data.title: Investors stay resilient with 9-day inflow streak for US spot Bitcoin ETFs, with $2.12B inflows indicating growing conviction.
data.description: In the span of just nine days, US spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted an impressive $2.12 billion in inflows, indicating a notable increase in confidence and interest from investors.

data.title: LONGi EcoLife Series Module Top TaiyangNews Global Ranking, Ushering in the "25%+" Era of Photovoltaic Efficiency
data.description: In Xi'an, China on April 25, 2026, Taiyang News, a prominent photovoltaic media source, unveiled the "TOP SOLAR MODULES LISTING" for April 2026. LONGi's EcoLife series modules (LR7-54HJD-510M), featuring HIBC technology, have solidly secured their position on the list. This unveiling marks a significant recognition for LONGi as they continue to make strides in the solar industry.

data.title: Powell DOJ Probe Put On Hold, Not Closed, Say Elizabeth Warren And Dick Durbin: 'Leaves The Door Wide Open For...'
data.description: Democratic lawmakers have raised concerns over the Justice Department's decision to pause the investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Senators Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin cautioned that the probe could be revived at any time, as per CNBC. U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro confirmed that her office is stepping back while the Federal Reserve's inspector general examines cost overruns linked to a renovation project. Pirro emphasized that the investigation could be restarted if necessary, stating, "I will not hesitate to restart a criminal investigation should the facts warrant doing so." The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pony.ai Announces New Generation Autonomous Driving Compute Platform Built on NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on April 25, 2026, Pony AI Inc. introduced its latest innovation - a new generation autonomous driving domain controller. This high-performance compute system is tailored for Pony.ai's L4 autonomous driving platform and other applications. The company is listed on NASDAQ as PONY and on HKEX as 2026.

data.title: Wynn Macau Showcases Macao's Sino-Portuguese Heritage in Madrid
data.description: A recent roadshow showcased the unique attractions of Macao to European travelers, focusing on porcelain, cuisine, and immersive cultural experiences. Organized by the Macao Government Tourism Office, the "Experience Macao" event took place from April 17 to 21 at Plaza Puente in Madrid. The roadshow aimed to expand Macao's appeal and drew the attention of a significant number of participants. This initiative sought to promote Macao as a desirable destination for European tourists by highlighting its diverse cultural offerings, including porcelain exhibitions, culinary delights, and engaging cultural activities. Through this event, Macao aimed to position itself as an attractive and enriching travel option for European visitors, with a focus on enhancing awareness of the destination and its distinctive cultural heritage.

data.title: Google May Pour Up To $40 Billion Into Anthropic As AI Compute Demand Booms
data.description: Google, listed under NASDAQ as GOOGL and GOOG, is set to invest $10 billion in the AI startup Anthropic, with the possibility of an additional $30 billion linked to performance targets. The initial cash infusion from Google values Anthropic at $350 billion, consistent with its previous funding round from February, excluding the most recent funding. If specific goals are achieved, Google could inject another $30 billion into the startup. Prior to this deal, Google's investment in Anthropic exceeded $3 billion, resulting in a 14% ownership stake, as per reports from the New York Times. Anthropic has been experiencing heightened demand, leading to strategic agreements for increased computing capabilities. The partnership follows Anthropic’s recent collaboration with Google and Broadcom. Anthropic and Google have yet to comment on these developments. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: WisPaper Enables Parallel Scientific Exploration, Moving Research Beyond Sequential Workflows
data.description: In Singapore on April 25, 2026, WisPaper, an academic research agent powered by AI, unveiled a novel method for scientific workflows that enables simultaneous research processes. This innovation tackles a persistent issue in research where studies are traditionally carried out in sequential order, resulting in inefficiencies.

data.title: Stablecoin volume reaches $33 trillion in 2025 as Ripple (XRP) advocates for multi-asset infrastructure to boost competitiveness.
data.description: In 2025, the transaction volume of global stablecoins surged to a staggering $33 trillion. Ripple, represented by its XRP token, is advocating for the adoption of multi-asset capabilities within payments infrastructure as a crucial measure to maintain competitiveness in the market. This shift comes as a response to the evolving landscape of digital transactions and the growing importance of diversification in the financial technology sector.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ether see significant institutional investment at $78K mark, with Japan blockchain bond test and U.S. crypto regulation delays causing talk.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged to $78,000, with significant investments from institutions such as Strategy and BitMine. In Japan, there has been a notable trial of blockchain technology for issuing bonds, raising interest in the potential of this innovation. Meanwhile, discussion has intensified in the U.S. due to delays in implementing cryptocurrency regulations, prompting varied opinions on the matter.
